name: Image cleanup on model drop
summary: Zeroing image arrays doesn't delete disk files; must call cleanupClipboardImages() immediately.
detail: Debugged issue where clipboard images persisted on disk when dropped due to model incompatibility. Steer and submit flows now trigger immediate cleanup instead of waiting for session exit.
content: Debugged issue where clipboard images persisted on disk when dropped due to model incompatibility. Steer and submit flows now trigger immediate cleanup instead of waiting for session exit.
